title: crataegus punctata f. canescens
intro: Crataegus punctata f. canescens, also known as the canescent hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree in the rose family, characterized by its grayish or white pubescent branches and small, fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to regulate heart rhythm and lower blood pressure due to its rich content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Crataegus punctata f. canescens include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve lipid profiles, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional to harness its medicinal properties.
